title: Bare Bones x Wilder Flowers
description: Bare Bones textures for Wilder Flowers mod ! 🌸
body:
This resource pack adds Bare Bones textures for [Wilder Flowers](https://modrinth.com/mod/wilder-flowers) mod !

- I highly recommend using [Bare Bones x Mods](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-mods) instead of this pack - It's a more convenient way to use my Bare Bones compatibility packs !
